forkNetworkTreeConfirmBody: This tree is read-only. Type a name below to create your editable copy in My garden.
forkNetworkTreeConfirmTitle: Create a local copy to edit?
forkNetworkTreeEmptyName: Please enter a name for the copy.
forkNetworkTreeInvalidData: This tree has no copyable content loaded.
forkNetworkTreePromptBody: What should we call this tree in My garden?
forkDemoTreeConfirmBody: The Arborito demo is read-only. Type a name below to create your editable copy in My garden.
forkDemoTreePromptBody: Choose a name for your editable copy in My garden.
graphComposedTreePlaylistHint: Edit the playlist in Forest → Trees, not from the map.
graphCreateParentError: Could not resolve the parent folder for the new item.
graphExamCreatedOk: Exam created. You can edit its content now.
graphFolderCreatedOk: Module created. Add lessons inside it next.
graphFolderToolsScopeHint: These actions apply to the folder shown above: new items are created inside it. The highlighted row below is a topic or lesson inside that folder.
graphFolderToolsScopeHintRoot: New items are added at the first level of the map (under this start). Open a folder if you want to create something inside it.
graphLessonCreatedOk: Lesson created. You can edit its content now.
graphMoveDisabledRoot: The map start cannot be moved.
graphMoveDisabledComposedWrapper: Linked branches in a tree cannot be moved.
graphMoveLocalUseTree: Reorganize topics with Move on the map; path-based moves are not used for local gardens.
graphDiplomaOffHint: Tap to enable an achievement when students finish every lesson in this folder
graphDiplomaOnHint: Tap to disable achievement for this folder
graphAchievementPendingHint: Achievement available when you finish every lesson in this folder
lessonAchievementFolderOn: This folder has an achievement enabled. Turn it on or off from the folder on the map.
lessonAchievementFolderOff: This folder has no achievement. Enable it from the folder on the map.
graphPromptFolderNameFriendly: You are creating a module inside “{parent}”. What should it be called?
graphPromptLessonNameFriendly: You are creating a lesson inside “{parent}”. What should it be called?
graphRenameNeedPath: Cannot rename this item yet (path missing).
nodePropertiesCertifiableHint: Students earn an achievement when they finish every lesson inside this folder. Works on any module or sub-folder: tap the folder on the map, open Properties, and turn this on.
moveNoTargets: No valid folder to move into.
moveReorderToEnd: Kept in the same folder and moved to the end of its siblings.
movePickOnTreeBanner: Navigate to the destination folder, then tap Move here.
movePickOnTreeHint: Navigate to the destination folder, then tap Move here.
plantBranchDesc: Creates a local draft on this device. If you are signed in, you can sync an encrypted copy to your account right after.
plantBranchSyncCheckbox: Sync encrypted copy to my account (other devices)
plantBranchSyncFailed: Branch created, but account sync failed: {message}
plantBranchOpenFailed: Could not open your new branch.
plantBranchOpenFailedReason: Could not open your new branch: {reason}
treeMetaCreatorMissingHint: Sign in with your online account (Profile → Sign in) so the tree card shows you as the creator.
treeMetaDescriptionBranchPh: Short summary of this module for learners
treeMetaDescriptionPh: Short summary for learners (map and full intro modal)
treeMetaMinCharsHint: Minimum {n} characters (required to save when changing these fields).
treeMetaSupportStripeHint: Only Stripe Payment Links (https://buy.stripe.com/…) are accepted. The link always points to Stripe checkout.
treeNameRequired: Enter a name for your tree.
treeInactivityPausedLearners: Timer paused, learners accessed this copy today.
treeInactivityHint: Countdown runs while nobody uses this copy (owner or learners). Retract removes it sooner.
treeReadOnlyHint: This branch is read-only. Open a branch from My garden or your own branch published online to edit.
treesCcLicenseShort: All shared trees are free to reuse (CC BY-SA 4.0).
treeSupportStripeInvalid: That URL is not a valid Stripe Payment Link. Use a https://buy.stripe.com/… URL.
treeSwitcherAlreadyActive: You are already on this branch or tree. Open Forest to add more.
treeSwitcherSingleActiveHint: Already selected above. Pick another branch or tree below.
treeSwitcherExploreHint: Tap to switch tree or branch
treeSwitcherOnlyOne: No other tree or branch. More in Trees.
treeSwitcherNoVersions: No other edition or saved snapshots yet.
treeSwitcherContextTreeHint: Pick which tree or branch to explore.
treeSwitcherContextVersionHint: Pick the edition or snapshot for the current branch.
treeTorrentHealthHint: Branch bytes (folders + lessons). Arborito seeds a few buckets at a time (up to 8) while the app is open, not the whole branch at once.
treeTorrentSeederWarn: Seeding uses upload bandwidth. Stop below on mobile data. More buckets join every few minutes if you stay online.
